implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: UI component that collects task details (title, description, priority, due date, category) from the user and triggers the task creation process via onSubmit.
implementation.name: TaskForm
implementation.pseudo_code:
Render a form with fields for title, description, priority, category, and due date
On form submission:
    IF all required fields are filled
        Call onSubmit with the task details
    ELSE
        Show validation errors

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Function that sends a POST request to the backend to create a new task with the provided details.
implementation.name: api.createTask
implementation.pseudo_code:
Receive task details as input
Send POST request to /tasks endpoint with task data
IF response is successful
    Return created task
ELSE
    Throw error

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: FastAPI endpoint that receives task creation requests, validates input, and delegates creation to the database layer.
implementation.name: create_task
implementation.pseudo_code:
On POST /tasks with TaskCreate payload:
    Call database.add_task with the task data
    Return the created task

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Function that generates a unique task ID, stores the new task in the database, and returns the created task.
implementation.name: add_task
implementation.pseudo_code:
Get current list of tasks
Generate unique ID for new task
Create Task object with provided details
Append new task to list
Return new task

missing_implementations: User_name field is not present in the UI form, frontend API, backend endpoint, or database logic. The feature does not allow users to specify or capture user_name for new tasks.

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Provides the Edit button in the task list UI. When clicked, triggers the editing flow for a specific task by invoking the onEdit callback.
implementation.name: TaskItem Edit Button
implementation.pseudo_code:
IF user clicks Edit button on a task
    CALL onEdit(task)
    Open TaskForm with task details for editing

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Displays a form pre-filled with the selected task's details, allowing the user to modify and submit changes. Handles form submission for editing.
implementation.name: TaskForm (Edit Mode)
implementation.pseudo_code:
IF initialTask is provided
    Display form with initialTask details
    IF user submits form
        CALL onSubmit(updatedTaskDetails)
ELSE
    Display empty form for new task

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: API endpoint that receives updated task data from the frontend and processes the update request. Calls the backend function to update the task.
implementation.name: update_task endpoint
implementation.pseudo_code:
ON PUT /tasks/{task_id} with updated task data
    CALL database.update_task(task_id, task)
    IF updated_task is None
        RETURN 404 Task not found
    ELSE
        RETURN updated_task

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Handles the actual update of the task in the database/storage. Finds the task by ID, updates its details, saves changes, and returns the updated task.
implementation.name: update_task
implementation.pseudo_code:
FOR each task in tasks
    IF task.id == task_id
        updated_task = Task(id=task_id, **task_update)
        Replace task with updated_task in tasks
        Save tasks
        RETURN updated_task
RETURN None if not found
